mapper.select:
/* DR 수익 조회 */ select site_id, std_yearm, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d') as reduct_sdate, count(*) as reduct_cnt_hour, /* 감축 횟수-시간(회-hr) */ sum(reduct_cap) as reduct_cap, /* 감축이행용량 */ sum(reduct_amt) as reduct_amt, /* 감축인정용량 */ avg(reduct_cap_per) as reduct_cap_per, sum(cap_amt) as cap_amt, sum(reduct_reward_amt) as reduct_reward_amt, sum(total_reward_amt) as total_reward_amt, sum(csm_reward_amt) as csm_reward_amt, sum(ewp_reward_amt) as ewp_reward_amt, avg(profit_ratio) as profit_ratio /* 수익비율(%) : 필수 중개인-고객 계약시 정해짐 (FIX) */ from ( SELECT dr_revn_idx, site_id, std_yearm, std_timestamp, std_date, reduct_cap, basic_price, max_reduct_ratio, min_reduct_ratio, profit_ratio, tot_pay, basic_pay, reduct_stimestamp, reduct_etimestamp, reduct_sdate, reduct_edate, cbl_amt, act_amt, reduct_amt, smp, reg_date, mod_date , ( reduct_amt/reduct_cap )*100 as reduct_cap_per, /* 감축이행율 = (감축인정용량/감축이행용량) * 100 */ ( reduct_amt*reduct_cap ) as cap_amt, /* 용량정산금 = (감축인정용량 * 기본용량요금) */ 123 as reduct_reward_amt, /* 감축정산금 = 감축인정용량 * 시간 * 실적정산금(or 실적요금. 90원/kwh)(현재 임의의 숫자를 넣어 진행) */ ( ( reduct_amt/reduct_cap )*100 )+(123) as total_reward_amt, /* 실적총정산금액 = 용량정산금 + 감축정산금 */ 567 as csm_reward_amt, /* 고객정산금액 : KPX에서 동서발전에 100% 지급. 동서발전(or 인코어드 같은 중개업체)에서 수수료 제외하고 나머지 고객에게 지급(현재 임의의 숫자를 넣어 진행) */ 33 as ewp_reward_amt /* ewp 정산금액(현재 임의의 숫자를 넣어 진행) */ FROM tb_dr_revenue where 1=1 and site_id = #{siteId } and std_yearm between #{selTermFrom } and #{selTermTo } ) a group by site_id, std_yearm
, date_format(reduct_sdate,'%Y%m%d')
